label: Pruning now works like harvesting
items: Seasonal pruning is now a single task for the whole window — no more a new pruning task appearing every day of the season.
You can chip away at it: tap "Still pruning" to keep the task open (with a gentle 3/5/7-day nudge), and "Done pruning" once you've finished the lot.
Completed pruning shows a "Pruning completed on {date}" note, just like harvests.
We've tidied up the leftover daily pruning tasks the old system had created.
